name: Geometry Dash Stars
description: Geometry Dash Stars is a fun and exciting skill game, where you guide your block through the levels over many obstacles. Collect all the stars through the levels, and feel the rhythm of the music as you effortlessly avoid all the obstacles along the way. Can you finish all the 8 levels, and unlock all the characters in Geometry Dash Stars? Find out, and enjoy this free to play casual game!
instructions: Use the mouse or touch to play
